_note: LPV's definitional thresholds (Vt/kg cutoffs, plateau <=30, driving pressure <=15, adherence fraction, severity P/F & S/F cutoffs) are Python module constants in metrics/lpv/code/{02_features,02d_severity,05_tile_feed}.py, not config-driven.
